queries.question: How do students prepare for the ancient history test?
queries.sql: SELECT Tutors.firstname, Tutors.lastname, TutoringServices.date, TutoringServices.duration FROM TutoringServices JOIN TestPreparations ON TutoringServices.serviceId = TestPreparations.servicesId JOIN Tutors ON Tutors.id = TutoringServices.tutorId WHERE topic  = 'Ancient History'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?firstname ?lastname ?date ?duration WHERE {
  ?tutoringservices a :TutoringServices .
  ?testpreparations a :TestPreparations .
  ?testpreparations p:hasTutoringServices ?tutoringservices .
  ?tutors a :Tutors .
  ?tutors p:id ?id_l .
  ?tutoringservices p:tutorId ?tutorid_r .
  ?tutors p:firstName ?firstname .
  ?tutors p:lastName ?lastname .
  ?tutoringservices p:date ?date .
  ?tutoringservices p:duration ?duration .
  ?testpreparations p:topic ?topic_f .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?tutorid_r))
  FILTER(STR(?topic_f) = STR("Ancient History"))
}

queries.question: How do students prepare for the ancient history test?
queries.sql: SELECT OnlineResources.title, OnlineResources.url FROM OnlineResources JOIN TestPreparations ON OnlineResources.resourceID = TestPreparations.resourcesID WHERE topic  = 'Ancient History'

  ?testpreparations p:hasOnlineResources ?onlineresources .
  ?onlineresources p:title ?title .
  ?onlineresources p:url ?url .

} }

  ?tutors p:firstName ?firstname .
  ?tutors p:lastName ?lastname .
  ?tutoringservices p:date ?date .
  ?tutoringservices p:duration ?duration .
  ?testpreparations p:topic ?topic_f .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?tutorid_r))
  FILTER(STR(?topic_f) = STR("Ancient History"))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?firstname ?lastname ?date ?duration ?title ?url WHERE {
  ?tutoringservices a :TutoringServices .
  ?testpreparations a :TestPreparations .
  ?testpreparations p:hasTutoringServices ?tutoringservices .
  ?onlineresources a :OnlineResources .
  ?testpreparations p:hasOnlineResources ?onlineresources .
  ?tutors a :Tutors .
  ?tutors p:id ?id_l .

  ?tutors p:firstName ?firstname .
  ?tutors p:lastName ?lastname .
  ?tutoringservices p:date ?date .
  ?tutoringservices p:duration ?duration .
  ?onlineresources p:title ?title .
  ?onlineresources p:url ?url .
  ?testpreparations p:topic ?topic_f .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?tutorid_r))
  FILTER(STR(?topic_f) = STR("Ancient History"))
} }
}
